channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ten dead, several injured in multi-vehicle crash at Malaha on Webuye–Kitale highway
item.description: At least ten people lost their lives in a serious road accident at Malaha along the busy Webuye–Kitale highway after a trailer reportedly rammed into several passenger vehicles and motorcycles. The cr...

item.title: European Tech Firms Launch Open-Source UnifiedAttestation to Replace Google Play Integrity for De-Googled Android Devices
item.description: A newly formed European industry consortium, spearheaded by German company Volla Systeme GmbH, is developing an open-source alternative to Google's proprietary Play Integrity API. This API currently v...

item.title: Chato MPs and councillors arraigned for alleged corruption in council chair elections
item.description: On Monday, March 9, 2026, two Members of Parliament from Chato constituency along with four councillors appeared in Geita Resident Magistrate’s Court facing corruption allegations. The Prevention and ...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Raises Petrol and Diesel Prices Amid Global Oil Crisis
item.description: Dangote Refinery don raise petrol price to ₦1,175 per litre, na third time dem dey increase am within just seven days. The ex-depot price don climb from ₦995 to ₦1,175, which be sharp 18.1% jump for o...

item.title: Ontario Home Care Vendor Paid Ransom Following Ransomware Attack Affecting Patient Data
item.description: In 2025, Ontario Medical Supply (OMS), a company contracted by Ontario Health atHome to deliver home care equipment, suffered a significant ransomware attack that locked access to its servers. The bre...

item.title: Trump expresses dissatisfaction with Mojtaba Khamenei's appointment as Iran's Supreme Leader but avoids confirming targeting
item.description: US President Donald Trump, during a news briefing in Doral, Florida, refused to confirm whether Iran's newly appointed Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei – son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei – has a...

item.title: African Human Rights, Governance, and Security Updates
item.description: On 10th March 2026, several key issues across Africa have been highlighted. In Zimbabwe, human rights organisations are renewing calls for justice over the disappearance of pro-democracy activist Itai...

item.title: Manila and Makati adopt four-day workweek for government offices
item.description: In a bid to conserve energy and reduce fuel consumption amid ongoing Middle East conflicts, Manila and Makati local governments, along with the Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA), have s...

item.title: Labour introduces definition for anti-Muslim hostility and appoints first oversight tsar
item.description: The Labour Party has introduced a formal definition of 'anti-Muslim hostility' and appointed the UK's first dedicated tsar to address such issues, as part of a £4million initiative. The government ass...

item.title: Kwimba District Disburses Interest-Free Loans to Support Women, Youth, and People with Disabilities
item.description: KWIMBA District Council for Mwanza region don give total ya 246 million shillings kwa 11 groups consisting women, youth, and people with disabilities. The main purpose ni to help dem improve their inc...

item.title: South Korea Raises Security Concerns Over Potential U.S. Air Defense Relocation to Middle East
item.description: South Korea has expressed strong opposition to the United States potentially relocating key air defense systems, such as THAAD and Patriot missiles, from the Korean Peninsula to the Middle East amid t...

item.title: Friend of late author Ken Walibora breaks down in court while recounting how he identified the body
item.description: In this news article, a close friend of the late renowned Kiswahili author and journalist Professor Ken Walibora breaks down in court while giving testimony about how he identified Walibora’s body at ...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Rate Stands at ₦1420 Sell, ₦1400 Buy on March 9, 2026
item.description: The article reports the current Dollar to Naira exchange rates as of March 10th, 2026, with focus on the parallel market, also called black market or Aboki fx. For Monday, 9th March 2026, Bureau De Ch...

item.title: Karachi Police Releases Traffic Management Plan for Youm-e-Ali Procession on 21st Ramadan
item.description: KARACHI: Karachi Police have released a detailed traffic management plan for the upcoming Youm-e-Ali procession, scheduled for 11th March, which coincides with the 21st of Ramadan. The main mourning p...

item.title: US officially accuses Afghanistan of detaining foreigners unlawfully
item.description: On 10th March 2026, the United States formally designated Afghanistan as a 'State Sponsor of Wrongful Detention', making it the second country to get this label after Iran. Secretary of State Marco Ru...

item.title: Kashmiri Political Leaders from Ruling and Opposition Visit Iranian Embassy to Condole Khamenei's Death and Express Solidarity
item.description: In the backdrop of ongoing tensions in the Middle East, several prominent leaders from Jammu and Kashmir, representing both the ruling National Conference and opposition parties like the PDP, visited ...

item.title: Oil prices surge amid escalating Middle East tensions, could reach $150 under severe supply disruptions
item.description: Global oil prices have spiked sharply, with Brent crude settling above $114 per barrel and briefly touching $119, marking the largest single-day gain since April 2020. Analysts warn that prices could ...

item.title: Union Minister Requests Telangana to Sign PPA with NTPC to Meet Rising Electricity Demand
item.description: Union Minister for Coal and Mines, G Kishan Reddy, has called upon the Telangana government to sign a power purchase agreement (PPA) with the National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC) to address the s...

item.title: EACOP launches programme to support girls’ school attendance with menstrual hygiene
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM: The East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP) project imeanzisha programme mpya ya shule inayoitwa “Keep a Girl in School” chini ya Social Economic Investment and Corporate Social Respons...

item.title: Kenya Engages TikTok to Boost Digital Safety Before Elections
item.description: Nairobi — Kenya is stepping up efforts to make TikTok safer as the country prepares for the next election cycle. CS William Kabogo of the Information, Communications and Digital Economy Ministry has s...
